title: 7 Signs You Have a Brother in Christ, Not Just a Contact
caption:
7 signs you have a brother in Christ, not just a contact. Most guys only have the second one.

A contact gets your highlight reel. A brother gets the real one. He asks the second question, shows up without being summoned, and tells you the truth even when it costs the friendship.

James 5:16 says confess your sins to one another. A real brother remembers what you confessed and never once uses it against you.

If you can't name a guy who fits this list, that's not a small gap. Start closing it this week.

#faith #brotherhood #christianmen #manofgod #community #james5
